title: Paul's fight with Tyson & Taylor-Serrano epic in pictures
content:
Jake Paul's shorts reportedly cost $1m (Â£793,000) to make

Friday night in Texas brought two extremes of boxing.

YouTuber Jake Paul easily outboxed a 58-year-oldMike Tyson for eight drab rounds,just 30 minutes afterKatie Taylor and Amanda Serranoput on an all-time classic.

The event was Netflix's first boxing show and Paul suggested more than 100 million people watched it live.

Despite the disappointment of the main event, there were some cracking pictures taken across the night.

Here are some of the best.

Amanda Serrano flew out of the traps against Katie Taylor

Serrano fought most of the fight with a huge cut above her eye and Taylor continually targeted it

The moment of joy for Taylor, but just look at the face of Serrano

Taylor's mother, who is always at her fights, was over the moon for her

Jake Paul's ring walk took ages, despite the fact he drove there

A YouTuber and an undisputed heavyweight champion meet in the ring. Not a picture we ever thought we would see

Paul was far the busier fighter, landing 78 punches and throwing 278

Money shot from Paul, who never really put his foot on the gas looking for the knockout

Tyson only landed 18 punches in the whole eight rounds

A weird moment in the final 10 seconds as Paul bowed to Tyson. Makes a good picture, though

Paul and Tyson embraced once the fight was finished, with many in the stadium already on their way home

NBA legend Shaquille O'Neal was in attendance

From left to right: Landon Lewis, Lennox Lewis, Sugar Ray Leonard and Daniel Ray Leonard

Actress and film producer Charlize Theron (centre)

Boxing schedule and results 2024

Watch every Born to Brawl episode

Notifications, social media and more with BBC Sport
